purpose: To provide multiple channels for users to contact HubSpot, including sales, customer support, and direct contact information for global offices and local sales numbers.
importantSections: Connect with one of our global offices
Call Sales using one of our local numbers (Americas)
Call Sales using one of our local numbers (Europe, the Middle East, and Africa)
Call Sales using one of our local numbers (Asia Pacific)
summary: This is HubSpot's contact page, offering users various ways to get in touch with the company. It provides options for contacting sales and customer support, along with a detailed list of their global office locations and direct local phone numbers across different regions.
